Home › Oklahoma Growers License Bond

Oklahoma Growers License Bond

Oklahoma Growers License Bond

($50,000 OMMA Requirement)

Fast, affordable, and fully compliant with Oklahoma medical marijuana regulations.

The Oklahoma cannabis growers bond is a mandatory $50,000 surety bond required by OMMA for most commercial cultivators. Securing this bond is essential for keeping your grow license active and compliant.

Working in the cannabis industry? Visit our Cannabis Bond Hub for grower, dispensary, and cannabis license bond requirements and application guides.

![](/assets/images/Bond-Cannabis.png)

What Is the Oklahoma Cannabis Growers Bond?

OMMA requires a $50,000 surety bond to ensure growers follow state rules. This bond protects the state if a cultivator fails to meet regulatory, environmental, or operational obligations.

Who Needs an Oklahoma Grower License Bond?

The bond is required for:

All commercial growers applying for a new OMMA license

All growers renewing an existing license

Exception: Growers who have owned their land for 5+ years may be exempt. Without proof of land ownership or a bond, OMMA will reject the license application.

$50,000 Surety Bond Cost in Oklahoma

The bond amount is fixed at $50,000, but the premium varies based on:

Credit

Financials

Business history

Most growers pay around $1,000 per year. Inspire Surety provides transparent, competitive pricing for all OMMA‑required bonds.

How to Complete Your Medical Marijuana Bond Application

Courts typically require:

Bond equal to the estate value

Proof of identity

Credit review

Court appointment documents

Compliance with state probate statutes

Some states allow bond waivers if all heirs agree, but courts may still require one.

How the Probate Bond Process Works

1

Complete the Application

Complete your cannabis bond application online

2

Secure the Lowest Rate

We match you with the best rate for the $50,000 OMMA bond - available from A‑rated sureties.

3

Receive your bond

Submit proof of bond with your Oklahoma grower license application
